ModMetaData.name: RJW Youth Consent Patch
ModMetaData.author: NotYourBusiness
ModMetaData.description:
Allows Youth ↔ Adult relationships with a configurable minimum age.
Features: - Slider in Mod Settings (13 to 17) - Default is 16 - Works both ways (male/female initiator) - Toggle on/off - Very lightweight Harmony patch
Perfect for players who want more realism for late teens without going full permissive.
